etimesMan cooks curry with immersion rod amid LPG shortage; internet roasts ‘Minto ka kaam ghanto main’An LPG shortage in India is forcing households to adopt creative cooking methods, as highlighted by a viral video showing an immersion rod used to cook curry. While some find humor in the situation, experts warn of health risks associated with using immersion rods for food preparation, urging adherence to safe cooking practices.

etimesWatch: Sloth bear vs tigress? Unusual moment caught at Pilibhit Tiger ReserveA rare and surprising encounter unfolded at Pilibhit Tiger Reserve as a sloth bear was filmed fearlessly chasing a tigress. Wildlife enthusiasts were captivated by the unusual footage, which shows the bear pursuing the startled feline into the forest. This unexpected interaction highlights the unpredictable nature of wildlife, reminding us that animals don't always conform to our expectations.

etimes“Ye toh tandoor me bana raha hai, gas ka kya kaam hai?” – Customer’s question goes viral amid LPG shortageAmidst an LPG crunch and rising prices, a viral video captured a chaap stall vendor citing gas costs for price hikes. However, the food was being cooked on a coal tandoor, leading to amusement and relatable social media reactions about business acumen and customer perception. The incident highlights the disconnect between stated reasons and actual practices.
